doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core 5-day notice provision and most service methods accurately reflect 735 ILCS 5/9-209, but the email-service clause and "conformed text 2024" framing appear to be fabricated additions not found in the actual statute.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 72
REASON: The core 5-day notice requirement and most service methods accurately reflect 735 ILCS 5/9-209, but the document adds claims (e.g., the specific email-service provision with written consent, and the "conformed text 2024" framing) that do not appear in the actual statute and seem fabricated or embellished, making this a mix of genuine and invented content.
